title: German Signs in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **You do not need fluent German to move well in Berlin.** You need the sign words that tell you what to do next.
**Ausgang, Eingang, Gleis and Richtung solve most station confusion.** Exit, entrance, platform and direction are the core words.
**Entwerten is the expensive one to miss.** If a paper ticket needs validation, stamp it before the first ride.
**Ersatzverkehr or SEV means the normal route changed.** Stop waiting on autopilot and look for the replacement route.
**Nur Barzahlung, Kasse, Pfandautomat, WC and Apotheke are everyday survival signs.** They decide payment, bottle return, toilets and medicine stops.
